title: 10 best herbal teas for bunion
intro_desc: Herbal teas for bunion are natural remedies that help alleviate the pain and discomfort associated with bunions, a bony protrusion on the joint of the big toe. These teas are made from various herbs such as Glycyrrhiza glabra, Urtica dioica, Arnica montana, Achillea millefolium, Equisetum arvense, Hamamelis virginiana, Aloe vera, Hypericum perforatum, Calendula officinalis, and Curcuma longa, which have anti-inflammatory properties. If left untreated, bunions can cause chronic pain, difficulty walking, and even depression, significantly impacting one's quality of life and mobility.
